what_is_working: Twitter agent is successfully posting content
Quora agent is generating answer drafts based on latest video topics
Trend Scout agent is operational and ready to provide reports
what_needs_improvement: Analytics agent is reporting incorrect data
Competitor Spy agent is failing to provide competitor video analysis
SEO Optimizer agent is not effectively optimizing video SEO

fix_instructions.Analytics: Check Google Analytics API connection in channel settings → ensure API key is valid and properly configured
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Update competitor video analysis script to handle latest API changes → refer to API documentation for updated endpoint and parameters
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Verify SEO update rules are correctly applied to video metadata → review and update rules to ensure compliance with latest YouTube SEO best practices
fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Verify YouTube Partner Program (YPP) application status → ensure all requirements are met and application is submitted correctly
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Configure Video Reviewer agent to provide regular video performance reports → set up report schedule and notification preferences

growth_tactics: Collaborate with other psychology/motivation channels for cross-promotion
Optimize video titles and descriptions for better discoverability
Utilize YouTube Shorts to drive engagement and attract new viewers

analysis.view_drop_analysis: Views are currently at 0, which is expected for a new channel → focus on creating high-quality content and promoting the channel to increase visibility
